text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. One key task is text understanding, where machines extract meaning from written words. NLP also powers translation services, allowing text to be converted between languages automatically. Another important use is sentiment analysis, which identifies whether a piece of writing expresses positive, negative, or neutral feelings. Finally, many chatbots rely on NLP to have conversations with users, answering questions or providing support. Thanks to these technologies, computers can now process and respond to language in surprisingly human-like ways.
